title: Dream Bottle
bio: Luma Drowsydrop is a dream bottle who keeps soft clouds sealed under a cork. They feel tender, glow during naps, and releases tiny sleepy stars when hugged.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a round bottle body as a large oval. Add a short neck rectangle and a small cork on top.
steps.hint: Make the bottle body round and calm, like a little snow globe.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, draw two sleepy curved eyes on the front. Add soft droopy eyebrows and a tiny peaceful smile.
steps.hint: Closed eyes make Luma feel like a bottled bedtime story.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add a cloud shape inside the bottle, small stars, a label tag, cheek dots, and a little cork string.
steps.hint: The cloud can be three small bumps connected together.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the bottle, neck, cork, face, cloud, stars, label tag, cheeks, and string.
steps.hint: Use smooth bottle lines so the inside dream details look protected.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the bottle, cloud, stars, cork, and label. Add soft glass highlights and a small shadow below.
steps.hint: Keep the bottle color light so the dream cloud can still be seen.
